title: Ethiopian Lamb Tibs
description: A flavorful and spicy Ethiopian dish made with tender lamb, onions, and a blend of aromatic spices. Serve over a bed of warm injera bread for a truly authentic experience.
instructions: Heat the spiced ghee in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped lamb and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the chopped fir (thyme), Ethiopian spices, and salt. Stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 20-25 minutes or until the lamb is tender.
Serve hot over a bed of warm injera bread, garnished with additional fir (thyme) if desired.
